_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 mutation expands an EGFR-dependent peripheral nerve progenitor that confers neurofibroma tumorigenic potential.

_contextSnippet: clonal density for secondary sphere formation was determined via limiting dilutions to be between 1 in 300 and 1 in 400 cells/cm² (data not shown)
details: Clonal density for secondary sphere formation was determined to be between 1 in 300 and 1 in 400 cells/cm²
